status.empty: No supervised collectors report remote config yet.

audit.subtitle: Trace who changed telemetry configuration and when.

instances.empty: No instance topology is currently available.

versioning.compare_needs_two: Need at least two revisions to compare
versioning.compare_error: Failed to load one of the revisions.
versioning.rollback_confirm_body: Re-push revision {{hash}} to this workload. The agent will receive it as a new push.
versioning.raw_diff_warning: Raw YAML diff may contain sensitive values.

otel.title: OTel impact summary
otel.helper: Review collector-level changes before pushing this config.
otel.unavailable: OTel impact summary unavailable. Fix YAML errors or reload the active config to compute it.

versioning.known_good_only_applied: Only applied revisions can be marked known-good
versioning.rollback_only_applied: Only applied revisions can be rolled back. Failed or pending revisions are not safe rollback targets.
versioning.known_good_load_error: Failed to load Last known-good state.
versioning.mark_known_good_confirm_title: Mark this revision as Last known-good?
versioning.mark_known_good_confirm_body: Future rollback defaults will target this config for this workload until another revision is marked.

safety.title: Config safety
safety.subtitle: Know what will change before it reaches this workload.

readonly.title: Read-only collector
readonly.body: Push is unavailable because this collector only reports config. Run it under the OpAMP Supervisor to enable remote config changes.

safety.footer: Supervised collectors apply remote config through OpAMP and report status back here.

validate.title: Validate before push
validate.body: Server-side checks parse YAML, verify collector structure, and compare referenced components with this workload.

helper.success: This draft passed validation and can move to the push step.
helper.error: Resolve the blocking validation errors before pushing.

compare.title: Compare with active config
compare.body: Use the diff to review YAML and OTel impact before changing the live collector.

helper.error: Reload the active config before relying on the diff.
helper.first: No active config exists yet, so this push will become the first known config.
helper.available: Review the active-vs-draft diff before pushing.

push.title: Push safely
push.body: Remote config is sent only after validation passes and the workload can accept pushes.

helper.readonly: This collector runs in read-only mode and cannot receive remote config.
helper.timeout: No response has arrived yet; keep monitoring before retrying.
helper.applying: Waiting for the workload to acknowledge the new config.
helper.failed: The workload rejected or failed to apply the last pushed config.
helper.applied: The workload reported that the latest pushed config was applied.

rollback.title: Roll back to known-good
rollback.body: Push history keeps previous revisions available when you need to recover quickly.

helper.auto: Automatically restored {{hash}} after the workload reported a failed apply.
helper.history: Use push history to inspect or restore a previous revision.
helper.empty: After the first successful push, this workload will keep rollback history.

canary.title: Manual canary push
canary.subtitle: Validate a small target set before promoting a remote config to the rest of the workload.
canary.safety_plan_required: Generate a non-blocking Config Safety Plan before starting a canary.
canary.feature_disabled: Manual canary rollout is not enabled for this workspace.

git.import_missing: Name, repository URL, and file path are required.

git.readonly_compare_help: Read-only collectors can report effective config but cannot receive push controls.

action.rollout_title: Persisted rollout storage is not implemented by the backend yet.

application_plan.gitops_export_disabled: GitOps export is not enabled for this workspace.

recovery.feature_disabled: Guided rollback is not enabled for this workspace.

editor.plan_load_failed: Failed to load config safety plan.

readonly_note.after: extension which can only report its configuration. Run it under the OpAMP Supervisor to enable remote config pushes.

aggregate.failed: Config push failed. Review errors and affected instances.
aggregate.rollback_failed: Rollback failed. Review details before retrying.

field.id.help: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes. 1–64 characters. Cannot be changed after creation.

configs.subtitle: Saved configs, templates, drafts, and known-good references in one safe workspace.

form.name: Name

templates.subtitle: Built-in starter configs grouped by stack. Variables show the expected placeholders only.
templates.no_variables: No variables advertised for this template.

saved.title: Saved configs and references
saved.subtitle: Older rows without library metadata are treated as saved configs.

action_reasons.remote_config_unsupported: Remote config is not supported by this collector.
action_reasons.push_pending_too_long: A config push is already pending too long; review status before retrying.
